title: Mouse Sens HUD
description: To see the sensitivity on screen
body:
![menu](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/85f4a6921b51f4e1c89441a430291aa82426e815.png)

🎯 Mouse Sensitivity Display — Take Full Control of Your Aim

Do you often tweak your mouse sensitivity or just want to know exactly how you’re playing?
Mouse Sensitivity Display is the perfect mod for you — lightweight, visual, and fully customizable, built to give you complete control over your aim.

With this mod, you’ll always see your current mouse sensitivity right on your screen, with no performance loss or complicated setup. Adjust, test, and perfect your settings like a pro.

⚙️ Key Features:

🧭 See your sensitivity in real time — Always know exactly what you’re playing on.

🎨 Fully customizable position — Place the display anywhere on your screen.

🔁 Works in both Singleplayer and Multiplayer — No server installation needed.

🚀 100% Client-side & ultra lightweight — No extra dependencies, no lag, no hassle.

⚡ Optimized for performance — Zero FPS impact, seamless integration.

🖱️ Perfect for serious players — Great for anyone who values precision, consistency, and control.

💡 Why you’ll love it:
With Mouse Sensitivity Display, every adjustment you make has purpose. Seeing your exact sensitivity in real time helps you fine-tune your settings and find that perfect balance for peak performance.
A small mod — with a huge impact on your gameplay.

🔥 Ready to master your sensitivity?
👉 Download Mouse Sensitivity Display and take your aim to the next level.
